title: Rs 10,000 Cash Aid, Free LPG, Loan Waivers...: AIADMK Unveils 297 Promises Ahead Of TN Polls
description: From cash transfers to job quotas, EPS-led AIADMK releases 45-page manifesto that banks on welfare-heavy pitch to take on the ruling DMK on April 23. The results for the 234-seat Assembly will be declared on May 4.
